title: Vector-Substrate Aperture Capture Receipt
description: Exact capture/grow decision emitted by the residual-learner bridge when an Aperture scan packet is admitted into the forced basis of the ambient number field. Replaces the v0.4.2b bridge's float gluing_obstruction with a measured residual norm and an asserted grade with a computed grade.

engine.description: real engine identifier, or 'sympy-reference' for the dependency-free variant

active_lane.description: Aperture scan family / lane that produced the observation

projection_residual_before.description: exact ||r||^2_G before any growth; '0' IFF already captured

projection_residual_after.description: exact ||r||^2_G after growth; '0' IFF now captured

captured.description: true IFF the observation lies in the current forced basis (exact membership)

adjoined_seed_minpoly.description: monic-integer minimal polynomial (high->low) of the adjoined algebraic-integer seed

grade.description: computed grade on Aperture's grade-gate lattice
